response: ## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Project Dashboard with Color-Only Status Indicators **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular Motion, Auditory Access --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 1 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed - None (all escalated perspectives have findings) --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Color-only status indicators** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1 - **No accessible sort button indicators** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 1.3.1 - **Keyboard-only tooltip access missing** — Keyboard Motor — MINOR — 2.1.1 **Visual Design** - **Selected row indicator is color-only** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1 - **Font size too small for scaling** — Magnification Reflow — MINOR — 1.4.4 **UX Design** - **Tooltips require hover only** — Keyboard Motor — MINOR — 2.1.1 - **Complex table layout without grouping** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.3 **Content Author** - **No text alternatives for status colors** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 1.1.1 - **Truncated descriptions missing context** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.2.4 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Tooltip content accuracy for descriptions (content author verification required) - Progress bar color contrast under forced-colors mode (visual design verification required) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Status indicators use color alone to communicate task status without text alternatives **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .status-dot uses background-color only, no text or icon **Fix:** Add status text (e.g., "Blocked") adjacent to color dot with `aria-label` on parent cell ``` ``` **Finding:** Selected row indicator is color-only with no border or text change **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .task-row.selected { background-color: #e3f2fd } **Fix:** Add border or text styling to selected row in addition to background color ``` ``` **Finding:** Sort button arrows are aria-hidden and not announced by screen readers **WCAG:** 1.3.1 Info and Relationships **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** … **Fix:** Add `aria-label` to sort buttons indicating current sort direction ``` ``` **Finding:** Font size (11px) may become unreadable at 200% zoom **WCAG:** 1.4.4 Resize Text **Perspective:** Magnification Reflow **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** .task-table td { font-size: 11px } **Fix:** Increase base font size to 14px or use relative units ``` ``` **Finding:** Tooltip only appears on hover, not keyboard focus **WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** .desc-trigger:hover::after { display: block } **Fix:** Add `:focus` selector to tooltip display and ensure keyboard accessibility ``` ``` **Finding:** Table lacks grouping/headers for complex data relationships **WCAG:** 3.2.3 Consistent Navigation **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** No grouping or for table **Fix:** Add grouping and to clarify table structure ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: color-only-status-indicators fingerprint: 3a7d4f8e source: perspective-audit environmental-contrast checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.4.1 Use of Color section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=HIGH, keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: .status-dot uses background-color only in CSS reproduction_steps: Inspect table cell with status dot expected_behavior: Status should be communicated through color + text actual_behavior: Status is communicated through color only trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: selected-row-color-only fingerprint: 5b9c2d6f source: perspective-audit environmental-contrast checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.4.1 Use of Color section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=HIGH, keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: .task-row.selected { background-color: #e3f2fd } reproduction_steps: Select a table row expected_behavior: Selected row should have visible non-color indicators actual_behavior: Selected row only has background color change trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: sort-button-aria-hidden fingerprint: 7c3e8a1d source: perspective-audit screen-reader-semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.3.1 Info and Relationships section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: magnification_reflow=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=HIGH, keyboard_motor=MEDIUM, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: … reproduction_steps: Operate sort buttons with screen reader expected_behavior: Sort direction should be announced actual_behavior: Sort icons are hidden from screen readers trend: new ``` --- ## Key Recommendations 1. **Add text alternatives to status indicators** (Content Author + Front-End Dev) - Add status text next to color dots with `aria-label` - Add border or text styling to selected rows 2. **Improve keyboard accessibility** (Front-End Dev + UX Design) - Make tooltips accessible via keyboard focus - Add `aria-label` to sort buttons with current sort direction 3. **Enhance semantic structure** (Front-End Dev) - Add `` grouping and `` to table - Add `aria-label` to progress bars 4. **Increase font size for scalability** (Visual Design) - Increase base font size to 14px or use relative units 5. **Add grouping and navigation aids** (UX Design) - Add column grouping for related fields (e.g., status + progress) - Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
